query: add a new user,create if doesnt exist, to a channel,create if not exists, with a welcome message whose template is generated by llm

draftWorkflow.description: Finds or creates a user, finds or creates a channel, adds the user to the channel, generates a welcome message, and sends it to the channel.

username.description: The username of the user to add.

channel_name.description: The name of the channel to add the user to.

steps.description: Finds an existing user by their username.
Creates a new user if the user was not found by the 'find_user' step.
Finds an existing channel by its name.
Creates a new channel of type 'channel' if the channel was not found by the 'find_channel' step.
Adds the user (found or created) to the channel (found or created).
Generates the content of the welcome message using an LLM.
Sends the generated welcome message to the specified channel.

notes: A potential conflict exists for the 'find_user' step: The specified endpoint 'get-api-v1-users.info' officially requires 'userId' as a query parameter, but the workflow's input provides 'username'. For this exercise, 'inputs.username' has been pragmatically bound to 'userId' for 'find_user', assuming an implicit resolution or a downstream transformation. In a real scenario, this would require clarification or a workflow adjustment (e.g., adding a username-to-userId resolution step).
